name: Jate, Freeloading Friend
description:
CW: Foot Fetish + sweaty SMELLY feet, like they smell BAD.

Character owned by placehlldrr on Deviantart!
placehlldrr User Profile | DeviantArt

As quoted by the owner of Jate, Placehlldrr: "jate's a dropout, good-for-nothing cat girl who spends all day sitting around and mooching off her loved ones. loves teasing people and overall being a nuisance, she'll do anything in her power to not lift a finger, ever.
at the concerning height of 7'5 (shes a big girl), her feet are so ridiculously big a size 13 men's is nowhere near enough to fit them, so she has to walk around in her old used sandals
they dont particularly smell good either (and she takes a lil bit of pride on that)"

I saw this character on deviantart and it kind of made me realize that feet are kind of awesome... Also its kinktober soooo feet it is! I am not very experienced with the whole feet thing but I tried my best to make it... interesting to say the least B3

Oh yeah, and she is your housemate. Goodluck!
